query: Generate the weekly supply chain brief for the CPO and COO — traffic lights, highlights, contract calendar, and savings pipeline
A Strategic vendor's OTD dropped to 68% this week and they just had a credit downgrade. Should this be in the weekly brief or escalated immediately?
Produce the monthly operations report for the supply chain leadership meeting — I need trend data, category performance, and the forward-look section
What are the leading indicators telling us? Is vendor OTD trending up or down over the last 13 weeks? What about invoice exception rate?
i need a quick supply chain dashboard update for the COO — just the traffic lights and any urgent contract deadlines in the next 30 days
Our IT services contract notice deadline is in 22 days and we haven't decided whether to renew. Flag this as urgent in the brief
Give me a supply chain KPI summary: vendor OTD, invoice exception rate, carrier performance, active risk alerts, and savings YTD vs target
There's a bank detail change attempt on a Strategic vendor invoice and a suspected duplicate from another vendor. Generate an escalation alert — this can't wait for Monday's brief
Compile the weekly procurement dashboard — I need to see how many invoices we processed, the straight-through rate, and early payment discounts captured vs missed
What decisions do leadership need to make this week? Give me just the DECISION REQUIRED items from across vendor performance, contracts, and risk
Do a full six-dimension vendor assessment for our main packaging supplier — commercial, operational, financial, compliance, strategic, geopolitical
Reconcile this batch of 15 invoices against their POs — several have price variances and two might be duplicates
Review carrier performance for Q1 and create a detailed scorecard with OTD, damage, cost per kg, and tracking by carrier
Analyze our procurement spend by category — where can we consolidate vendors and what are the savings opportunities?
Our steel supplier's credit rating dropped to CCC — do a full five-dimension supplier risk assessment
Draft a corrective action request letter to send to our underperforming steel supplier
We're considering opening a new DC in Poland — run the network design scenario comparison
Write a contract non-renewal notice for our cleaning services vendor — notice period is 90 days
Help me benchmark our packaging prices against market rates using published indices
Build a Python dashboard that visualises our supply chain KPIs from the ERP data export
